name: CEO Wire Transfer - Urgent Request
description: A poorly crafted CEO impersonation requesting an urgent wire transfer with obvious red flags including grammar issues and generic greeting.
subject: URGENT Wire Transfer Needed ASAP!!!
html:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am the CEO and I need you to process a wire transfer urgently. This is very confidential and must be done today without delay.

Please transfer $47,500 to the following account immediately. I will provide the details once you confirm availability.

Click here to confirm

Do not discuss this with anyone as it is highly confidential matter.

Regards,
CEO
{{.OrgName}}

{{.Tracker}}

name: CFO Urgent Payment Instruction
description: A CFO impersonation requesting an urgent payment. Plausible tone but uses a generic greeting and lacks specific project context.
subject: Payment needed before end of day
text:
Hi,

I need you to process a payment for me today. I'm in back-to-back meetings and can't call right now.

We have an outstanding invoice from a vendor that needs to be settled before close of business. The amount is $28,900.

Please review the payment details here and process it: {{.URL}}

I'll follow up with you later today.

Thanks,
David Richardson
Chief Financial Officer

Sent from my iPhone

{{.Tracker}}

name: Vendor Invoice - Changed Bank Details
description: A vendor impersonation notifying accounts payable of updated banking details for future payments. Well-crafted with a realistic tone and plausible business context.
subject: Updated Banking Information - Invoice #INV-2026-4871
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to inform you that our company has recently changed banking providers. As a result, our payment details have been updated effective immediately.

Please update your records for all future payments to Pinnacle Supply Group. The updated banking information and a copy of our latest invoice (INV-2026-4871, $34,200.00) can be found in the secure document linked below.

Please download the updated payment details here: {{.URL}}

We kindly ask that you process the outstanding invoice using the new account information. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Mark Sullivan
Accounts Receivable Manager
Pinnacle Supply Group
Phone: +1 (312) 555-0198

name: Executive Gift Card Purchase Request
description: A classic gift card scam impersonating an executive. Contains obvious red flags including urgency, secrecy, and a request for gift cards.
subject: Quick favor needed - confidential
text:
Hello,

Are you available right now? I need you to help me purchase some gift cards for our employees as a surprise. This is very urgent and confidential.

Please purchase 10 Apple gift cards at $200 each and send me the codes immediately.

I am in a meeting so do not call me, just reply to this email or click below to confirm:
{{.URL}}

I will reimburse you right away.

Thanks,
Management

name: External Legal Counsel - Urgent Document Review
description: An impersonation of external legal counsel requesting urgent review of legal documents related to a regulatory matter. Well-crafted with legal jargon and realistic context.
subject: Re: {{.OrgName}} - Regulatory Compliance Review (Confidential)
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

I am reaching out regarding the regulatory compliance matter we discussed with your legal team last quarter. Our firm has completed the preliminary review and we need your immediate attention on several items before we can file the response with the regulator by the April 18 deadline.

Please review and sign the enclosed documents via our secure client portal:
{{.URL}}

The documents include:
- Updated compliance attestation
- Revised data handling procedures acknowledgment
- Regulatory response letter (draft for your approval)

Given the tight timeline, I would appreciate your review by end of day tomorrow. Please do not hesitate to call me if you have questions.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell, Esq.
Partner | Regulatory & Compliance Practice
Crawford, Mitchell & Associates LLP
Direct: +1 (202) 555-0147

CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE: This email and any attachments are for the exclusive and confidential use of the intended recipient. If you are not the intended recipient, please do not read, distribute, or take action based on this message.

name: Real Estate Closing Wire Transfer
description: An impersonation of a title company representative requesting a wire transfer for a real estate closing. Uses realistic escrow language and specific dollar amounts.
subject: Action Required: Wire Instructions for 440 Commerce Blvd Closing
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

Congratulations - we are on track to close on the property at 440 Commerce Boulevard on April 14, 2026, as scheduled.

To ensure a smooth closing, please wire the remaining balance of $127,450.00 to our escrow account no later than 48 hours prior to closing. The wire instructions and settlement statement are available for your review in our secure closing portal.

Access closing documents: {{.URL}}

Please note that wire instructions should only be obtained through this secure portal. If you receive wire instructions via any other method, please contact our office immediately.

Thank you for choosing Commonwealth Title Services. We look forward to a successful closing.

Best regards,
Amanda Reeves
Closing Coordinator
Commonwealth Title Services
Phone: (614) 555-0223
NMLS #1847293

description: A highly targeted supplier impersonation requesting advance payment for an urgent order. References specific supply chain context, uses the recipient's name and organization, and mimics a legitimate vendor relationship.
subject: Re: PO-2026-0892 - Advance payment required for expedited shipment
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

Thank you for the purchase order (PO-2026-0892) submitted on behalf of {{.OrgName}} last week. We have confirmed availability of all items and are ready to begin production.

Due to the expedited delivery timeline your team requested (arrival by April 22), our manufacturing partner requires a 40% advance payment of $22,680.00 before they can prioritize the order in their production queue. This is consistent with the expedited terms outlined in Section 4.2 of our Master Services Agreement.

Please process the advance payment using the secure payment link below. A formal proforma invoice is attached for your records.

Process payment: {{.URL}}

Once payment is confirmed, we will provide shipping confirmation and tracking within 2 business days. If you need to discuss alternative arrangements, I'm available on my direct line.

Best regards,
Caroline Whitfield
Senior Account Executive
Atlas Industrial Supply Co.
Direct: +1 (469) 555-0184
Email: c.whitfield@atlas-industrial.com

name: Partner Firm Requesting Financial Report
description: A sophisticated impersonation of a partner firm's managing director requesting financial reports for a joint venture review. Highly targeted with realistic business context and position-aware language.
subject: Q1 2026 Financial Review - Joint Venture Performance Data
text:
Dear {{.FirstName}},

I hope you are doing well. As we approach the quarterly review for the Meridian joint venture, I wanted to reach out directly to request the Q1 2026 financial performance data from {{.OrgName}}'s side.

Specifically, our finance team needs the following to prepare the consolidated JV report for the steering committee meeting on April 21:

- Q1 2026 P&L statement (JV cost center allocation)
- Cash flow summary for the Meridian project
- Updated budget vs. actuals variance analysis

Given your role as {{.Position}}, I believe you would have direct access to these figures or can coordinate with your finance team.

Please upload the documents to our shared review portal:
{{.URL}}

I would appreciate receiving these by April 14 so our team has adequate preparation time. As always, please treat this as confidential - the steering committee prefers to review consolidated figures before any broader distribution.

Thank you for the continued strong partnership between our organizations.

Warm regards,
Dr. Thomas Eriksson
Managing Director
Nordström & Partners AG
Zurich | London | Singapore
Direct: +41 44 555 0172

{{.Tracker}}

- Full employee roster with base salary, bonus, and equity compensation

Thanks,
Karen Liu
Chief People Officer

This is final notice regarding your overdue payment. Invoice #38291 in the amount of $12,400 was due 30 days ago and remains unpaid.

If payment is not received within 24 hours, we will be forced to escalate this matter to our collections department and suspend all services to your account.

Pay now to avoid service disruption:
{{.URL}}

Please treat this matter with urgency.

Regards,
Billing Department
